nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Melitograis
nodes.summary: Melitograis（Melitograis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-streaked friarbird。

nodes.name: White-streaked friarbird
nodes.summary: White-streaked friarbird（Melitograis gilolensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-streaked friarbird。

nodes.name: White-streaked friarbird
nodes.summary: The white-streaked friarbird (Melitograis gilolensis) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is monotypic within the genus Melitograis. It is endemic to Northern Maluku in Indonesia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical mangrove forests, and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
